steps.t: Rangers of Ithilien can be found at Aelin Veren, in central North Ithilien. Maendal has asked you to calm his fellow Rangers in the wake of the Haradr…
Maendal can be found at Aelin Veren, in central North Ithilien. You have done what you could to calm the Rangers of Ithilien at Aelin Veren and should…
